title: Upon Slouch.
content:
Slouch he packs up, and goes to several fairs,
    And weekly markets for to sell his wares:
    Meantime that he from place to place does roam,
    His wife her own ware sells as fast at home.
meaning:
"Upon Slouch." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
